title: CPH2611_14.0.0.832(EX01)
description:
New version:CPH2611_14.0.0.832(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

System

 • Adds the feature of setting the default alarm sound in "Clock" for all alarms in a unified manner.

 • Adds the "App clone" option for "Default app to open" of the "App Cloner" feature. You can set the default app that is opened using the quick functions.

 • Expands the scope of fuzzy searching other apps in "App Cloner" for easier searching.

 • Integrates the September 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
